# terrible_community_general_homebrew_services (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) An installed homebrew package whose service is to be updated.

### Optional

- `path` (String) A `:` separated list of paths to search for `brew` executable. Since a package (*formula* in homebrew parlance) location is prefixed relative to the actual path of `brew` command, providing an alternative `brew` path enables managing different set of packages in an alternative location in the system.
- `state` (String) State of the package's service.

### Read-Only

- `pid` (Number) If the service is now running, this is the PID of the service, otherwise -1.
- `running` (Boolean) Whether the service is running after running this command.
